featureName: Smart Routing v2 — Persistent Phone→Team Mapping
description: Persistent phone_team_mappings table as routing cache. All channels (WhatsApp, SMS, voice) share the same mapping. Property-aware context for tenants/owners, intervention context for providers, multi-team disambiguation.

userStories.title: Migration: phone_team_mappings table + indexes + RLS + backfill
userStories.description: As the system, I need a persistent table to cache phone→team associations so returning contacts are auto-routed without re-identification
acceptanceCriteria: Table phone_team_mappings created with columns: id, contact_phone, team_id, user_id, user_role, source, last_used_at, created_at
UNIQUE constraint on (contact_phone, team_id)
Indexes on contact_phone and team_id
RLS: gestionnaire/admin SELECT for their team
Backfill from ai_whatsapp_sessions (completed, team_id NOT NULL)
Backfill from ai_phone_calls (team_id NOT NULL, caller_phone NOT NULL)
Types regenerated (npm run supabase:types)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Migration 20260329105518. Table + UNIQUE + 2 indexes + RLS (is_team_manager) + backfill from sessions+calls. CHECK constraints on source and user_role. Types regenerated.

userStories.title: phone-mapping.service.ts: CRUD + lookup + property/intervention queries
userStories.description: As the system, I need a service layer for phone_team_mappings with lookup, create/update, property fetching, and provider intervention fetching
acceptanceCriteria: lookupMappings(phone): returns all mappings for a phone number
createOrUpdateMapping(phone, teamId, userId?, role?, source): upsert with last_used_at
touchMapping(phone, teamId): update last_used_at only
fetchUserProperties(userId, teamId): returns lots/buildings via lot_contacts + building_contacts + addresses
fetchProviderInterventions(userId, teamId): returns active interventions assigned to provider
deleteStaleMappings(phone, teamId): removes mapping when user left team
All queries use lots.team_id (NOT NULL) not lot_contacts.team_id (nullable)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: New file phone-mapping.service.ts (~480 lines). 10 exported functions. runIdentificationCascade covers team_members(all roles) → lot_contacts → building_contacts → supplier_contracts. verifyMappingFreshness handles 7-day staleness check.

userStories.title: Webhook refactor: mapping lookup replaces team_members as primary routing
userStories.description: As a returning contact, I want to be automatically routed to the same team without re-identification so my experience is seamless
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1: lookup phone_team_mappings (primary) instead of team_members
Step 2: first-contact cascade if 0 mappings (team_members ALL roles + lot_contacts + building_contacts + supplier_contracts)
team_members query no longer filters .eq('role', 'locataire') — matches ALL roles
Mapping created after every successful identification
Session fallback (step 3b) removed — replaced by persistent mapping
1 mapping → auto-route, 2+ → defer to routing flow
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Webhook refactored: 4-branch → 3-branch (mapping/multi/unknown). Session fallback removed. Cascade creates mappings immediately. mappingUserRole field added to IncomingWhatsAppMessage type. normalizePhoneE164 import moved to phone-mapping.service.

userStories.title: Property selection flow for tenants/owners
userStories.description: As a known tenant with multiple properties, I want to be asked which property my message concerns so the intervention is correctly linked
acceptanceCriteria: RoutingState extended with 'awaiting_property_selection'
RoutingMetadata extended with property_options, selected_lot_id, selected_building_id
0 properties → normal conversation
1 property → confirmation question ('Votre message concerne [address]?')
2+ properties → numbered list + 'Autre chose' option
Selected property pre-fills extracted_data.lot_id/building_id/pre_identified
SMS messages condensed (shorter labels)
Invalid reply → retry (max 2) then normal conversation
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Types extended: RoutingState + RoutingMetadata + SessionExtractedData (lot_id, building_id, pre_identified). handlePropertySelectionFlow in routing-flow.service.ts: 0 props→skip, 1→OUI/NON confirm, 2+→numbered list+Autre. sendPropertySelectionMessage + parseConfirmationReply in twilio-whatsapp.service.ts. SMS labels condensed (60 chars). Max 2 retries then skip. Wired in conversation-engine after routing, before session load.

userStories.title: Intervention selection flow for providers (MVP)
userStories.description: As a known provider, I want to see my active interventions when I message so I can reference the right one
acceptanceCriteria: RoutingState extended with 'awaiting_intervention_selection'
RoutingMetadata extended with intervention_options
0 active interventions → normal conversation
1+ active interventions → numbered list with reference + description + address
Selected intervention pre-fills building_id/lot_id from the intervention
MVP: provider always creates NEW intervention (no thread reply)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: RoutingState + RoutingMetadata extended. InterventionOption now includes buildingId/lotId. handleInterventionSelectionFlow in routing-flow.service.ts. sendInterventionSelectionMessage in twilio-whatsapp.service.ts (SMS condensed). Last option = 'Nouveau problème' → skip pre-fill. Max 2 retries. Reuses createPropertySession, clearPropertyState, resolvePropertyState helpers. Wired in conversation-engine after property selection.

userStories.title: Multi-team selection from mappings
userStories.description: As a contact linked to 2+ teams, I want to choose which team I'm writing to so my message reaches the right agency
acceptanceCriteria: RoutingState extended with 'awaiting_team_selection'
Teams sorted by last_used_at DESC
Numbered list with team names
Selection → update last_used_at → continue to property/intervention flow
'Autre' option → ask for agency name → create new mapping if match
Lint passes
userStories.notes: RoutingState: +awaiting_team_selection, +awaiting_team_agency. handleTeamSelectionFlow replaces old disambiguation for multi-mapping. sendTeamSelectionMessage shows team names. Autre → awaiting_team_agency → matchTeamByName → createOrUpdateMapping. touchMapping on selection. Conversation-engine: team selection runs BEFORE routing (multi-mapping intercept).

userStories.title: Pre-identified property in conversation engine + Claude prompt
userStories.description: As the AI, I need to know which property was pre-selected so I can reference it in conversation and skip address collection
acceptanceCriteria: SessionExtractedData extended with lot_id, building_id, pre_identified
Claude system prompt includes property info when pre_identified=true
AI skips ETAPE 1 (address collection) when property pre-identified
Conversation engine passes pre-identified data through to session
Lint passes
userStories.notes: SessionExtractedData already extended in US-004. buildSystemPrompt: conditional ETAPE 1 — if pre_identified, only ask name (skip address). fetchPreIdentifiedAddress in conversation-engine: queries lot (with apt number) or building for address. Address pre-filled in sessionExtracted before Claude call.

userStories.title: Pre-identified property in intervention creator
userStories.description: As the system, I need to use the pre-identified lot/building directly instead of fuzzy matching so interventions are correctly linked
acceptanceCriteria: When extracted_data.pre_identified=true, use lot_id/building_id directly
Skip fuzzy address matching when pre-identified
Fallback to fuzzy match when not pre-identified (existing behavior)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Step 2 in intervention-creator: if pre_identified, use lot_id/building_id directly. Else fallback to fuzzy address matching. lotId changed from const to let.

userStories.title: ElevenLabs webhook: upsert mapping after voice call
userStories.description: As a caller who used the voice agent, I want my phone number remembered so next time I use WhatsApp/SMS I'm auto-routed
acceptanceCriteria: After tenant identification (step 4), upsert phone_team_mappings
Mapping created with source='voice_call'
If caller phone is null, skip mapping (graceful)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Step 4b added after tenant identification: createOrUpdateMapping(source='voice_call'). Guarded by callerPhone && teamId. Dynamic import for tree-shaking. Non-blocking try/catch.

userStories.title: Mapping lifecycle: staleness check + update after session
userStories.description: As the system, I need to keep mappings fresh by updating user_id/role after sessions complete and checking for stale team memberships
acceptanceCriteria: After session complete with identified_user_id: update mapping user_id/user_role if null
On routing: if mapping.last_used_at > 7 days, verify team_members.left_at IS NULL
If user left team: delete mapping, re-run cascade
If role changed: update user_role in mapping
Mapping creation on first-contact also happens in routing-flow after address_match/agency_match/orphan resolution
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Post-session enrichment: createOrUpdateMapping after conversation_complete (if identified_user_id). Routing-flow: createOrUpdateMapping after each resolveRoutingSession (address_match, agency_match, orphan x2). Staleness already implemented in US-002 (verifyMappingFreshness) and called in US-003 (webhook).
